tools.name: bookshelves.booksBookshelvesGet
tools.description: Retrieves metadata for a specific bookshelf for the specified user.

tools.name: bookshelves.booksBookshelvesList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of public bookshelves for the specified user.

tools.name: bookshelves.booksBookshelvesVolumesList
tools.description: Retrieves volumes in a specific bookshelf for the specified user.

tools.name: cloudloading.booksCloudloadingAddBook
tools.description: Add a user-upload volume and triggers processing.

tools.name: cloudloading.booksCloudloadingDeleteBook
tools.description: Remove the book and its contents

tools.name: cloudloading.booksCloudloadingUpdateBook
tools.description: Updates a user-upload volume.

tools.name: dictionary.booksDictionaryListOfflineMetadata
tools.description: Returns a list of offline dictionary metadata available

tools.name: familysharing.booksFamilysharingGetFamilyInfo
tools.description: Gets information regarding the family that the user is part of.

tools.name: familysharing.booksFamilysharingShare
tools.description: Initiates sharing of the content with the user's family. Empty response indicates success.

tools.name: familysharing.booksFamilysharingUnshare
tools.description: Initiates revoking content that has already been shared with the user's family. Empty response indicates success.

tools.name: layers.booksLayersAnnotationDataGet
tools.description: Gets the annotation data.

tools.name: layers.booksLayersAnnotationDataList
tools.description: Gets the annotation data for a volume and layer.

tools.name: layers.booksLayersGet
tools.description: Gets the layer summary for a volume.

tools.name: layers.booksLayersList
tools.description: List the layer summaries for a volume.

tools.name: layers.booksLayersVolumeAnnotationsGet
tools.description: Gets the volume annotation.

tools.name: layers.booksLayersVolumeAnnotationsList
tools.description: Gets the volume annotations for a volume and layer.

tools.name: myconfig.booksMyconfigGetUserSettings
tools.description: Gets the current settings for the user.

tools.name: myconfig.booksMyconfigReleaseDownloadAccess
tools.description: Release downloaded content access restriction.

tools.name: myconfig.booksMyconfigRequestAccess
tools.description: Request concurrent and download access restrictions.

tools.name: myconfig.booksMyconfigSyncVolumeLicenses
tools.description: Request downloaded content access for specified volumes on the My eBooks shelf.

tools.name: myconfig.booksMyconfigUpdateUserSettings
tools.description: Sets the settings for the user. If a sub-object is specified, it will overwrite the existing sub-object stored in the server. Unspecified sub-objects will retain the existing value.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryAnnotationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an annotation.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryAnnotationsInsert
tools.description: Inserts a new annotation.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryAnnotationsList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of annotations, possibly filtered.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryAnnotationsSummary
tools.description: Gets the summary of specified layers.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryAnnotationsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing annotation.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesAddVolume
tools.description: Adds a volume to a bookshelf.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesClearVolumes
tools.description: Clears all volumes from a bookshelf.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesGet
tools.description: Retrieves metadata for a specific bookshelf belonging to the authenticated user.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of bookshelves belonging to the authenticated user.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesMoveVolume
tools.description: Moves a volume within a bookshelf.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesRemoveVolume
tools.description: Removes a volume from a bookshelf.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryBookshelvesVolumesList
tools.description: Gets volume information for volumes on a bookshelf.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryReadingpositionsGet
tools.description: Retrieves my reading position information for a volume.

tools.name: mylibrary.booksMylibraryReadingpositionsSetPosition
tools.description: Sets my reading position information for a volume.

tools.name: notification.booksNotificationGet
tools.description: Returns notification details for a given notification id.

tools.name: onboarding.booksOnboardingListCategories
tools.description: List categories for onboarding experience.

tools.name: onboarding.booksOnboardingListCategoryVolumes
tools.description: List available volumes under categories for onboarding experience.

tools.name: personalizedstream.booksPersonalizedstreamGet
tools.description: Returns a stream of personalized book clusters

tools.name: promooffer.booksPromoofferAccept
tools.description: Accepts the promo offer.

tools.name: promooffer.booksPromoofferDismiss
tools.description: Marks the promo offer as dismissed.

tools.name: promooffer.booksPromoofferGet
tools.description: Returns a list of promo offers available to the user

tools.name: series.booksSeriesGet
tools.description: Returns Series metadata for the given series ids.

tools.name: series.booksSeriesMembershipGet
tools.description: Returns Series membership data given the series id.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesAssociatedList
tools.description: Return a list of associated books.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesGet
tools.description: Gets volume information for a single volume.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesList
tools.description: Performs a book search.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesMybooksList
tools.description: Return a list of books in My Library.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesRecommendedList
tools.description: Return a list of recommended books for the current user.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesRecommendedRate
tools.description: Rate a recommended book for the current user.

tools.name: volumes.booksVolumesUseruploadedList
tools.description: Return a list of books uploaded by the current user.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
